Epistemo Vikas Leadership School Admission Procedure
Enquire Now

Start by Filling the Enquiry Form: Parents should begin the process by completing an enquiry form.

Schedule a Counseling Session: Optionally, parents can book an appointment with the Parent Relations Team for a one-on-one counseling session.

Interaction with the Student: All grade levels (except Nursery) require an interaction with the student, conducted by a team of teachers during school hours.

Admission on First-Come, First-Served Basis: Admissions are granted based on availability and the outcome of the student interaction.

Complete Formalities: If the student is selected, parents must complete the necessary formalities to confirm admission.

Remote Interaction (if needed): For out-of-area or overseas applicants, Skype interactions can be arranged.

Epistemo Vikas Leadership School Required Documents
Enquire Now
Photocopy of the child’s Birth Certificate.
Photocopy of the child’s Aadhar Card.
Passport size photos of child (3 copies).
Study Certificate or Bonafide Certificate from the previous school (for classes II & above).
Original Transfer Certificate from the previous school (for classes II & above).
Photocopy of the report card of the previous class.
Authentic blood group report (for residential students).
Medical certificate (if any allergies)
